'''Nang hul''', known in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as '''thud bugs''', were a type of projectile [[biot]] engineered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. They were used by [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong warriors]], who would throw them at victims. If the thud bug missed its target, it would fly in a loop back to its warrior.

==Description==
[[File:ThudBugUnderside-FF70.png|thumb|left|250px|An underside view of a thud bug]]
The thud bug was a beetle with sharp, jagged legs and wings. They were among the most common "bug" weapons used by the Yuuzhan Vong, such as [[blast bug]]s and [[razor bug]]s. Its wings were very powerful, emitting a loud buzzing sound when active, and causing a distinctive "thud" when striking an object. A thud bug's maximum velocity could exceed 150 [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|kilometers per hour]], knocking an opponent to the ground or breaking limbs. Thud bugs could also be used in such a way so as to stun or disorient targets, making them easy prey for capture. Thud bugs had the ability to home in on their target, even turning corners.<ref name="New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology" /> Masters of these weapons could cause the thud bug to return to their hand if they missed their target.<ref name="Legacy Era Campaign Guide" /> Thud bugs shaped from [[sparkbee]]s were the baseline for all such "bug" weapons.

Thud bugs could be killed with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], but their sturdy exoskeletons usually could not be broken in normal combat. If a thud bug became lodged in the ground, it could free itself using its wings and legs. They could simply be thrown at their target or shot at foes using a [[thud bug launcher]].

[[File:Maravsyomin.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Mara Jade Skywalker deflects incoming thud bugs thrown by Yomin Carr on Belkadan.]]
These biots served as the primary ranged weapon of the Yuuzhan Vong warrior. Following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] they became outlawed, but were still used by such underworld types as [[Jariah Syn]]. It is known that some existed on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] where they joined the [[tampasi]].

==History==
Around [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], [[Yomin Carr]], a Yuuzhan Vong warrior, engaged in combat with [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] in the [[ExGal-4]] listening post on the planet [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]]. Yomin Carr used many weapons against Mara Jade Skywalker, including throwing a dozen thud bugs at her, but she deflected them with her lightsaber. Yomin Carr was killed in the duel.<ref name="Vector Prime" />

[[File:SynNangHulTreylis-Legacy2006-2.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Jariah Syn using a thud bug against Hosk Trey'lis.]]
[[Jariah Syn]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], used thud bugs and razor bugs. He was taught how to use these alien weapons by [[Chonyo]], a Yuuzhan Vong crewmember on the ''[[Crimson Axe]]''.<ref name="Claws of the Dragon">[[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]]</ref> In [[137 ABY]], a skirmish occurred in [[Brogar's Safe House and Cantina|Brogar's]] on the planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], where Jariah Syn threw a thud bug at [[Hosk Trey'lis]], a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who was [[Hosk_Trey%27lis#On_the_run|on the run]] from the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. The shot from the thud bug knocked Hosk Trey'lis unconscious.<ref name="Broken2" />
